name: 道の駅 青雲橋
desc: 高さ137m・長さ410mの東洋一規模を誇るアーチ橋「青雲橋」を一望できる道の駅。竹細工など伝統工芸品や、チキン南蛮・鶏ごぼううどんが名物。
descEn: Offers views of the Seiun Bridge, an arch bridge said to be one of East Asia's largest at 137m high and 410m long. Known for bamboo crafts and other traditional goods, plus chicken nanban and chicken-and-burdock udon.
